diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_sources.py
+++ b/inspect_sources.py
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+import sys

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+import inspect

+from tsr.system import TSR

+from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras

+

+print('=== get_spherical_cameras signature ===')

+print(inspect.signature(get_spherical_cameras))

+print('=== get_spherical_cameras source ===')

+print(inspect.getsource(get_spherical_cameras))

+

+print('\n=== TSR.render signature ===')

+print(inspect.signature(TSR.render))

+print('=== TSR.render source ===')

+print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))

--- a/test_tsr_render_custom.py
+++ b/test_tsr_render_custom.py
@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+import sys

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+import os

+import json

+import torch

+import numpy as np

+from PIL import Image

+from tsr.system import TSR

+

+device = 'cuda'

+model = TSR.from_pretrained('/models/triposr', config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')

+model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)

+model.to(device)

+

+data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')

+obj_id = sorted(os.listdir(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train')))[0]

+obj_dir = os.path.join(data_dir, 'train', obj_id)

+print('Object:', obj_id)

+

+with open(os.path.join(obj_dir, 'cameras.json')) as f:

+    cameras = json.load(f)

+print('View 0 (input):', cameras[0])

+print('View 1 (target):', cameras[1])

+

+input_img = Image.open(os.path.join(obj_dir, 'input.png')).convert('RGB')

+scene_codes = model([input_img], device=device)

+

+# Test 1: render target view 1 with exact custom camera params

+cam = cameras[1]

+frame = model.render(

+    scene_codes,

+    n_views=1,

+    elevation=cam['elevation'],

+    azimuth=cam['azimuth'],

+    camera_distance=cam['distance'],

+    width=256,

+    height=256,

+    return_type='pt'

+)

+print('Custom render frame shape:', frame.shape)

+print('Custom render frame min/max:', frame.min().item(), frame.max().item())

+

+# Load ground truth for comparison

+gt = Image.open(os.path.join(obj_dir, 'target_views', 'view_01.png')).convert('RGB')

+gt_np = np.array(gt) / 255.0

+pred_np = frame[0].cpu().numpy().transpose(1, 2, 0)

+print('GT shape:', gt_np.shape, 'pred shape:', pred_np.shape)

+print('GT range:', gt_np.min(), gt_np.max(), 'pred range:', pred_np.min(), pred_np.max())

+

+# Compute simple L1

+l1 = np.abs(gt_np - pred_np).mean()

+print('L1 vs GT:', l1)

+

+# Save images for visual inspection

+os.makedirs('test_renders', exist_ok=True)

+Image.fromarray((pred_np * 255).astype(np.uint8)).save('test_renders/pred_view01.png')

+Image.fromarray((gt_np * 255).astype(np.uint8)).save('test_renders/gt_view01.png')

+print('Saved to test_renders/')
